title: Device Settings - Settings screen for disconnected device
scenario: Device Settings tabs (Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Delete Device) display correctly when navigating from disconnected headset state on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, tap the "..." (More Options) button.
5. Observe the tabs displayed on the Device Settings screen.
expected: The Device Settings screen should display tabs such as Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, and Delete Device. The available tabs may vary slightly between different device models.
